revision.text:
[[ja:天香山神社]] {{Expand Japanese|天香山神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Amanokaguyama Shrine | native_name = 天香山神社 | image = 天香久山神社の拝殿.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Amanokaguyama Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.49726|135.818307}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Amanokaguyama Shrine'''|天香山神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 194 ** P155: {{ill|Ihareyamakuchino Shrine|lt=Ihareyamakuchino Shrine|qid=Q135039028|1=Ihareyamakuchino Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Uneotsutamoto Shrine|lt=Uneotsutamoto Shrine|ja|畝尾都多本神社|qid=Q28685121|1=Uneotsutamoto Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|lt=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine|ja|耳成山口神社|qid=Q11610732|1=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Miko- Shrine|lt=Miko- Shrine|qid=Q135098855|1=Miko- Shrine}} * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 200 ** P155: {{ill|Ihareyamakuchino Shrine|lt=Ihareyamakuchino Shrine|qid=Q135039028|1=Ihareyamakuchino Shrine}} ** P155: {{ill|Uneotsutamoto Shrine|lt=Uneotsutamoto Shrine|ja|畝尾都多本神社|qid=Q28685121|1=Uneotsutamoto Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q11610732|ltq=Q11610732|qid=Q11610732|1=Miminashi Yamaguchi Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Miko- Shrine|lt=Miko- Shrine|qid=Q135098855|1=Miko- Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kashihara, Nara|lt=Kashihara|ar|كاشيهارا (نارا)|azb|کاشیهارا، نارا|ca|Kashihara|ceb|Kashihara-shi (lungsod sa Hapon)|ce|Касихара|cs|Kašihara|de|Kashihara|devoyage|Kashihara|en|Kashihara, Nara|envoyage|Kashihara|eo|Kaŝihara|es|Kashihara (Nara)|eu|Kashihara (Nara)|fa|کاشیهارا، نارا|fi|Kashihara|fr|Kashihara|gl|Kashihara|hy|Կաշիհարա|id|Kashihara, Nara|it|Kashihara|ja|橿原市|javoyage|橿原市|ko|가시하라시|ms|Kashihara, Nara|mzn|کاشیهارا، نارا|nl|Kashihara|no|Kashihara|pl|Kashihara|pt|Kashihara|ro|Kashihara|ru|Касихара|sh|Kashihara|simple|Kashihara, Nara|sr|Кашихара|sv|Kashihara|tg|Кашиҳара|th|คาชิฮาระ|tl|Kashihara, Nara|tr|Kashihara|tt|Касихара|uk|Касіхара|ur|کاشی ہارا، نارا|vi|Kashihara, Nara|war|Kashihara, Nara|zh_classical|橿原市|zh_min_nan|Kasihara-chhī|zh_yue|橿原|zh|橿原市|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} * {{ill|Q907495|ltq=Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Toichi district|lt=Toichi district|ja|十市郡|zh|十市郡|qid=Q11405036|1=Toichi district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041122180520/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22805 * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041122175856/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22810 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180853 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} * 180859 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あまのかぐやまじんじゃ * ウネヒノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō * アマノカコヤマノ- == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9150005004849 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135039033|ltq=Q135039033|qid=Q135039033|1=Amanokakoyamano- Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135039029|ltq=Q135039029|qid=Q135039029|1=Unehino- Shrine}} ** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県橿原市南浦町608', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '奈良県橿原市下八釣町', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:天香山神社]] {{wikidata link|Q98082987}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Amanokaguyama Shrine |Image = [[File:Haiden of Amanokaguyama Shrine.jpg|250px]]
Haiden (worship hall)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara City|Q496319|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} 608 Minamiura-chō | Latitude degrees = 34 | Latitude minutes = 29 | Latitude seconds = 50.1 | N (north latitude) or S (south latitude) = N | Longitude degrees = 135 | Longitude minutes = 49 | Longitude seconds = 05.9 | E (east longitude) or W (west longitude) = E | Map country code = JP-29 | Enshrined deity = {{ill|lt=Kushimachinomikoto|Q108039939|qid=Q108039939|1=Kushimachi no Mikoto}} | Sacred object = {{ill|lt=Amanokaguyama|Q11443780|qid=Q11443780|1=Mount Amanokagu}} | Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (Major)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} | Founded = Unknown | Annual festivals = October 10: Kangyosai (Return Procession Festival), October 12: Yoimiya Festival | Alternate name = | Map = Japan Nara }} '''Amanokaguyama Shrine''' (あまのかぐやまじんじゃ) is a Shinto shrine located in {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara City|Q496319|qid=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}. It is enshrined on the northern foothills of {{ill|lt=Amanokaguyama|Q11443780|qid=Q11443780|1=Mount Amanokagu}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Uneo Tsutamoto Shrine|Q28685121|qid=Q28685121|1=Uneotsutamoto Shrine}}, Sakamon Shrine (Amano Iwato Shrine), and {{ill|lt=Uneo-ni-masu Takeru-do-yasu Shrine|Q30931377|qid=Q30931377|1=Uneoza Taketsuyasugami Shrine}}, it is collectively called the “Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Yonkasho Shrine”[https://genbu.net/data/yamato/tutamoto_title.htm Uneo Tsutamoto Shrine]Washū Gogun Jinja Jinmeichō Tairyaku Chūkai. ===Enshrined deity=== * {{ill|lt=Kushimachinomikoto|Q108039939|qid=Q108039939|1=Kushimachi no Mikoto}} (くしまちのみこと) *: A deity who governs {{ill|lt=Divination by turtle shells|Q5510530|qid=Q5510530|1=Futomani}}. ===History=== The founding date is unknown, but ancient historical sources record the following: * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōyamato Province Tax Ledger|1=UNKNOWN}} (730): “One chō of sacred fields for Kushimachi, seed rice twenty bundles” * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Daidō First Year Decree|1=UNKNOWN}} (806): “Deity Kushimachinomikoto, one household” * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q1052981|lt=Sandai Jitsuroku|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}・January 27, Jōgan 1 (859): “Bestowed Junior Fifth Rank Lower, then promoted to Junior Fifth Rank Upper (referring here to Kushimachinomikoto)” * {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} (927): “Yamato Province, Tōichi District, Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Kushimanomikoto Shrine, major shrine, monthly and Niiname offerings” From these records, it can be said with certainty that the shrine existed in the 8th century[http://www.y-tohara.com/nara-kaguyama.html Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Kushimanomikoto Shrine (Nara, Kashihara City) – Tohara Top Page]. ===The Hahaka Tree=== The {{ill|lt=Uwamizuzakura|Q2700694|qid=Q2700694|lt=hahaka tree|1=Prunus grayana}} found within the shrine grounds is said to have been used for divination in ancient times. The enshrined deity, Kushimachinomikoto, is a god of divination who interprets divine will, and was revered as a deity involved in turtle-shell divination used to decide matters of national importance, as well as in the divination for determining sacred rice fields for offerings performed at the {{ill|lt=Daijōsai|Q11433653|qid=Q11433653|1=Daijosai}}[https://nihonshinwa.com/archives/870 Amanokaguyama Shrine | Enshrining the divination deity “Kushimanomikoto” who seeks divine will! Does the hahaka tree used in the Amano Iwato myth grow within the grounds? A super mythological romance spot!]. In the {{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|qid=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}, in the {{ill|lt=Amano Iwato|Q3231835|qid=Q3231835|lt=Amano Iwato myth|1=Amano-Iwato}}, it is written: “Summoning {{ill|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} and {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Futodama-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}, they pulled out the shoulder bone of a true male deer from Mount Amanokaguyama, took the hahaka of Mount Amanokaguyama, and performed divination…” This describes how the bones of a male deer from Amanokaguyama were extracted and burned with the bark of the ‘shuzakura’ tree to divine good or ill[https://www.city.kashihara.nara.jp/kankou/own_kankou/kankou/spot/amanokaguyama.html Kashihara City / Amanokaguyama Shrine]. ===Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Kushimanomikoto Shrine=== In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is recorded as “Yamato Province, Tōichi District, Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Kushimanomikoto Shrine, major shrine, monthly and Niiname offerings,” and the prevailing theory identifies Amanokaguyama-ni-masu Kushimanomikoto Shrine with Amanokaguyama Shrine. However, there is also a theory identifying it with Kunitokotachi Shrine, which is enshrined at the summit of Mount Amanokaguyama, making this a disputed shrine identification[https://nihonshinwa.com/archives/870 Amanokaguyama Shrine | Enshrining the divination deity “Kushimanomikoto” who seeks divine will! Does the hahaka tree used in the Amano Iwato myth grow within the grounds? A super mythological romance spot!]. ===Footnotes=== {{Reflist}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Amanokaguyama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Amanokaguyama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Amanokaguyama Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]]
